summary: Completed comprehensive iteration 2 testing of PGA Voice Bot - all new features working correctly including 12 updated scenarios, 5 bug patterns, seeded bug, scenario categories, recommendation field, and auto-detection UI components
passed_tests: Seeded bug exists in database on startup
Frontend shows scenario categories (Edge Case, Escalation, Standard)
Bug report form includes recommendation field
Bug form submission workflow works correctly
Bug count badge updates in navigation (1→2 after form submission)
Scenario categories display correctly: Edge Case (Probe, Trap, Guardrail), Escalation (Urgent, Human), Standard (others)
Seeded bug displays with CRITICAL severity and recommendation section
All 12 scenarios have proper categorization and display
Configuration status shows Twilio and Claude ready
Stats display correctly shows current counts
